THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RLC, LLC, DBA CROCKERS LOCKERS OF SAN FRANCISCO, A  CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRERA, ROQUE $1,289.34 PRINCIPAL, $266.10 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,555.44, AND FURTHER, PLAINTIFF RLC, LLC, DBA CROCKERS LOCKERS OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, MAY ENFORCE THIS JUDGMENT BY SALE OF THE PROPERTY OF THE DEFENDANT ROQUE HERRERA, AN INDIVIDUAL SUBJECT TO LIEN UNDER BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SEC. 21710.
